sentences.target: Je cherche un ancêtre du côté maternel.

translations.fr: Je cherche un ancêtre du côté maternel.
translations.en: I'm looking for an ancestor on my mother's side.
translations.es: Busco un antepasado por parte de mi madre.
translations.it: Cerco un antenato dalla parte di mia madre.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找我母亲那边的一位祖先。
translations.yue: 我喺我阿媽嗰邊搵一位祖先。
translations.ru: Я ищу предка по материнской линии.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um antepassado do lado da minha mãe.
translations.he: אני מחפש אחד מאבות המשפחה מצד אמי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một tổ tiên bên phía mẹ.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن أحد الأسلاف من جهة أمي.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een voorouder aan moeders kant.
translations.uk: Я шукаю предка по материнській лінії.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी माँ की ओर के एक पूर्वज की तलाश में हूँ.
translations.pl: Szukam przodka ze strony mojej matki.
translations.el: Ψάχνω έναν πρόγονο από την πλευρά της μητέρας μου.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en forfader på morssiden.
translations.id: Saya mencari seorang leluhur dari pihak ibu.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en anfader på mammas sida.
translations.ro: Caut un strămoș din partea mamei.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en forfader på mors side.
translations.ja: 母方の先祖を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the clausal subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular, agreeing with 'Je'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'ancêtre'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'cherche'.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the definite article 'le'; heads the prepositional phrase 'du côté maternel'.
Noun complement within the PP headed by 'du'; modified by 'maternel'.
Adjective modifying 'côté'; masculine singular to match the head noun.

translations.vi: Điện thoại của bạn quá cũ.
translations.el: Το τηλέφωνό σου είναι πολύ παλιό.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular, modifies 'téléphone'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article introducing the predicate noun 'ancêtre'.
Predicate noun (nominal complement) after 'est'.

sentences.target: On découvre un ancêtre dans les archives.

translations.fr: On découvre un ancêtre dans les archives.
translations.en: We find an ancestor in the archives.
translations.es: Encontramos un antepasado en los archivos.
translations.de: Wir finden einen Vorfahren in den Archiven.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在档案中发现了一位祖先。
translations.yue: 我哋喺檔案入面搵到一位祖先。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm thấy một tổ tiên trong kho lưu trữ.
translations.nl: We vonden een voorouder in de archieven.
translations.hi: हमने अभिलेखागार में एक पूर्वज पाया.
translations.nb: Vi fant en forfader i arkivene.
translations.id: Kami menemukan seorang leluhur di arsip.
translations.sv: Vi hittade en anfader i arkiven.
translations.ro: Am găsit un strămoș în arhive.
translations.da: Vi fandt en forfader i arkiverne.
translations.ja: 私たちは公文書館で先祖を見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiners 'ancêtre'.
Direct object of 'découvre'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, plural; determiners 'archives'.
Plural noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Mon grand-père parle souvent d’un ancêtre.

translations.fr: Mon grand-père parle souvent d’un ancêtre.
translations.en: My grandfather often talks about an ancestor.
translations.es: Mi abuelo habla a menudo de un antepasado.
translations.de: Mein Großvater spricht oft von einem Vorfahren.
translations.it: Mio nonno parla spesso di un antenato.
translations.ko: 우리 할아버지는 조상에 대해 자주 이야기한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爷爷经常谈起一位祖先。
translations.yue: 我爺爺成日講起一位祖先。
translations.ru: Мой дед часто рассказывает о предке.
translations.pt: Meu avô costuma falar de um antepassado.
translations.he: סבא שלי מדבר לעיתים קרובות על אחד מאבות המשפחה.
translations.tr: Dedem sık sık bir atadan bahseder.
translations.vi: Ông nội tôi thường nói về một tổ tiên.
translations.ar: جدي يتحدث كثيرًا عن أحد الأسلاف.
translations.nl: Mijn opa praat vaak over een voorouder.
translations.uk: Мій дід часто розповідає про предка.
translations.hu: A nagyapám gyakran beszél egy őséről.
translations.hi: मेरे दादाजी अक्सर एक पूर्वज के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.pl: Mój dziadek często mówi o przodku.
translations.el: Ο παππούς μου μιλάει συχνά για έναν πρόγονο.
translations.nb: Bestefaren min snakker ofte om en forfader.
translations.id: Kakek saya sering bercerita tentang seorang leluhur.
translations.sv: Min farfar pratar ofta om en anfader.
translations.ro: Bunicul meu vorbește des despre un strămoș.
translations.cs: Můj dědeček často mluví o předkovi.
translations.da: Min bedstefar taler ofte om en forfader.
translations.ja: 祖父はよく先祖の話をする。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular, modifies 'grand-père'.
Compound common noun; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'parle'.
Elision/contraction of 'de' + 'un'; preposition introducing the NP 'un ancêtre' as an oblique topic of 'parle'.
Noun complement of the preposition 'd’un'.
